timeline.title: Events Platform — Peak production usage
timeline.description: Dynamic form/survey platform used for large events. 48 events organized; 270,524 survey responses; peak 3,325 responses on 2026-01-24.

timeline.title: Events Platform — High-concurrency handling & FE features
timeline.description: Handled traffic spikes (up to 2,433 responses/hour, 103 responses/minute). Implemented dynamic form builder, Office365 SSO (MSAL), Excel export, and QR check-in.

timeline.title: myU — Orders & growth snapshot
timeline.description: Production e-commerce/ticketing site with measurable business impact: total orders and active users. Peak orders/day recorded.

timeline.title: MyU ID — Identity & SSO platform
timeline.description: Built OAuth2-based SSO, social login (Google/Facebook/Apple), OTP flows, device management, and structured logging. Serves as the authentication foundation for the ecosystem.

timeline.title: Hung Hau House — Architecture & platform update
timeline.description: Next.js + API + data layer architecture with emphasis on SSR/CSR patterns, auth (MSAL), hydration handling, and performance improvements.

notes: Source files: Docs/events-myu-vn, Docs/myu & id-myu, Docs/Hung Hau House. Convert/add more milestones as needed.
